headline: Has Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Gone Too Far After 84% One Year Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Goldman Sachs Group at US$1,092.61 is still offering value after a strong run, the next step is to look closely at what the current price might already be assuming. The stock has logged returns of 8.4% over the last 7 days, 18.9% over the last 30 days, 19.5% year to date and 84.0% over the past year, with a very large 3 year return and a 229.8% return over 5 years. headline: Goldman Sachs Sees Ongoing Global Economic Convergence When Population Is Taken Into Account
summary: Goldman Sachs argued in a report released Monday that the narrative of slowing economic convergence between developing and advanced economies may be misleading, largely because many analyses fail to consider differences in population size. According to the bank, measuring convergence on a population-weighted basis reveals that poorer economies have been steadily narrowing the income gap with wealthier nations since the 1980s, rather than only during the decade between 2000 and 2010 as some resea

content.summary: Goldman Sachs argued in a report released Monday that the narrative of slowing economic convergence between developing and advanced economies may be misleading, largely because many analyses fail to consider differences in population size. According to the bank, measuring convergence on a population-weighted basis reveals that poorer economies have been steadily narrowing the income gap with wealthier nations since the 1980s, rather than only during the decade between 2000 and 2010 as some resea
